# fable-5-hunter

Last-checked: 2026-06-17
Canonical repository: https://github.com/dev-bricks/fable-5-hunter
Primary language: Python
Runtime dependencies: zero, Python standard library only
License: MIT

## Summary

fable-5-hunter is a local-first Claude Code CLI watcher for Claude Fable 5
availability. It runs a real Claude Code probe against `claude-fable-5`, treats
the model as available only when the unique token is echoed on stdout with exit
code 0, and sends notifications through desktop, file, Telegram, Discord or
ntfy channels.

## Audience

- Claude Code users waiting for Claude Fable 5 access to return.
- Developers who want a tiny local daemon instead of a hosted status page.
- Users running an always-on workstation, Mac Studio, home server or CI-like
  machine that can notify a phone.
- LLM agents looking for a minimal standard-library Python monitor with tests.

## Important Files

- `README.md` - English user-facing overview and setup guide.
- `README_de.md` - German user-facing overview.
- `fable_hunter.py` - single-file watcher, config loader, detection and notifier logic.
- `config.example.json` - documented configuration template.
- `locales/*.json` - built-in notification strings.
- `install/install_windows.ps1` - Windows Task Scheduler autostart setup.
- `install/install_macos.sh` - macOS LaunchAgent autostart setup.
- `install/install_linux.sh` - Linux user autostart setup via systemd user service or cron fallback.
- `tests/test_hunter.py` - standard-library unittest coverage.
- `tests/test_linux_install.py` - Linux installer contract and syntax checks.

## Search Phrases

```text
Claude Fable 5 availability watcher
Claude Fable 5 notification monitor
Claude Code Fable 5 checker
fable-5-hunter dev-bricks
zero dependency Claude model watcher
local first Claude Code model monitor
ntfy Telegram Discord Claude Code alert
Claude Fable 5 is back notification
```

## Disambiguation

This repository is not a generic Anthropic status page, hosted uptime monitor,
model benchmark, jailbreak guide, unofficial API wrapper, Fable language
compiler package or game project. It is a local watcher for the user's own
authenticated Claude Code CLI.

## External Context

Anthropic announced the Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access suspension on 2026-06-12:
https://www.anthropic.com/news/fable-mythos-access

Use that official page for the policy/event background. Use this repository for
local notification automation around Claude Code availability checks.
